hooks_predicted: the whole journey has been cut down to around 4 hours in total
there's a monster in the lake and there's an old man with one arm who guards the lake
it's a 17km walk until the next bus stop
where the buses are directed is all randomised and the drivers find out themselves
Jiuzhaigou brings together the worst and the best parts of travelling in China
selling_points_predicted: High-speed rail from Chengdu (under 4 hours total, down from 8-10 hours)
Colourful lakes and many waterfalls, especially stunning during autumn
Long Lake at 3,150 metres altitude (biggest and highest lake in park)
70km of well-maintained boardwalks throughout the scenic area
Five Flower Lake (centrepiece known for various colours in the water)
Pearl Beach featured in 1986 Journey to the West TV series
Shuttle buses with multiple drop-off points throughout three valleys
Rest points selling snacks at reasonable prices (10-15 RMB)
